basic_details.job_title: DCPU Mayiladuthurai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Legal-cum-Probation Officer / Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Mayiladuthurai (DCPU Mayiladuthurai)
basic_details.post_name: Legal-cum-Probation Officer / Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Mayiladuthurai (DCPU Mayiladuthurai) Legal-cum-Probation Officer (LCPO) / Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator (DCPU) Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website http://www.mayiladuthurai.nic.in . A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Mayiladuthurai Legal-cum-Probation Officer (LCPO) / Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator (DCPU) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Legal-cum Probation Officer (LCPO): LLB from a recognized University. Experience of at least 2 years of working with Govt/NGO/Legal Matters. Preferably in the field of Women & Child Rights. Good understanding of Women & Child rights & protection issues. Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator (DCPU): 12th Passed from a recognized Board/Equivalent Board with Diploma/Certificate in Computers. Weightage for work experience.

salary_details.details: Legal-cum Probation Officer (LCPO): Rs. 27,804/- Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator (DCPU): Rs. 13,240/-

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.mayiladuthurai.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Mayiladuthurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Mayiladuthurai Recruitment 2026 is 27 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DCPU Mayiladuthurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the DCPU Mayiladuthurai Recruitment 2026, for the posts of Legal-cum-Probation Officer and Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Legal-cum-Probation Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Legal-cum-Probation Officer post, candidates must possess an LLB degree from a recognized university and have at least 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator post must have passed 12th standard and possess a Diploma or Certificate in Computers. Work experience will be given weightage.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the DCPU Mayiladuthurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the DCPU Mayiladuthurai Recruitment 2026. All candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Legal-cum-Probation Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Legal-cum-Probation Officer post is Rs. 27,804/- per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator post is Rs. 13,240/- per month. This position is also on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DCPU Mayiladuthurai Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Mayiladuthurai, which is http://www.mayiladuthurai.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Legal-cum-Probation Officer and Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator are on a contract basis.
